name: Booking.com
collaborationStyle: accommodation integration, travel vlog, affiliate link
notes: One of the most widely-used travel sponsors; accessible to creators of all sizes

name: Airbnb
collaborationStyle: stay showcase, destination vlog, unique property feature
notes: Strong fit for creators who feature unique stays or destination-focused content; selective for direct deals

name: Google Flights / Google Travel
collaborationStyle: flight search tutorial, travel planning integration, campaign
notes: Occasional campaign-based sponsorships; more selective than typical travel sponsors

name: Chase Sapphire (Travel Cards)
collaborationStyle: travel rewards story, points strategy, luxury travel integration
notes: Highest CPM in travel niche; heavily regulated; strong fit for travel-finance crossover creators

name: Expedia / Expedia Group
collaborationStyle: trip planning integration, package deals, campaign-based content
notes: Travel booking giant; strong fit for family, couple, and group travel creators

name: Delta Air Lines
collaborationStyle: flight experience, premium cabin reviews, route campaigns
notes: Ideal for aviation, points, and premium travel review creators

name: Marriott Bonvoy
collaborationStyle: hotel/resort stays, loyalty program stories, destination campaigns
notes: Great for hotel review, points, and business travel creators

name: Emirates
collaborationStyle: premium cabin experiences, route spotlights, aspirational travel campaigns
notes: Top-tier fit for flight reviewers and luxury travel channels

name: Intrepid Travel
collaborationStyle: small-group tour content, ethical travel stories, destination series
brandPersonality: small group, sustainable, adventure, culturally sensitive
notes: Excellent for adventure travel, sustainable travel, and storytelling creators

name: Turo
collaborationStyle: road trip integrations, destination driving content, budget travel stories
notes: Ideal for road trip, US national park, and destination-independent travel creators

name: Heymondo
collaborationStyle: travel safety story, sponsored segment, affiliate
notes: Aggressively sponsoring travel creators; good commission rates; fast onboarding

name: eSIM Go / Airalo
collaborationStyle: travel connectivity story, eSIM setup demo, international travel tip
notes: eSIM providers are among the fastest-growing travel sponsors; Airalo especially active with creators

name: Viator
collaborationStyle: tour/experience feature, destination guide, activity showcase
notes: Tours and experiences marketplace; great fit for destination-focused and cultural travel creators

name: World Nomads
collaborationStyle: adventure travel safety story, insurance explainer, sponsored segment
notes: Travel insurance brand built for adventurous travelers; strong fit for backpacking, solo travel, and adventure creators

name: Osprey
collaborationStyle: packing showcase, gear review, adventure travel integration
notes: Premium backpack and travel gear brand; ideal for adventure, hiking, and long-term travel creators

name: Away
collaborationStyle: packing tutorial, luggage review, travel aesthetic content
notes: DTC luggage brand with strong lifestyle crossover; great fit for aesthetic and luxury travel creators

name: Hostelworld
collaborationStyle: budget travel series, hostel tours, backpacking itineraries
notes: Ideal for hostel and backpacking creators with strong youth/low-budget audiences

name: Trainline / rail booking apps
collaborationStyle: train travel itineraries, Europe/Japan rail content, slow travel series
notes: Great fit for creators specialising in rail, metro, or sustainable ground travel

name: Priority Pass / LoungeKey
collaborationStyle: airport lounge review content, layover experiences, premium travel series
notes: Ideal for frequent flyer, aviation, and points enthusiast channels

name: Samsonite
collaborationStyle: luggage reviews, packing content, durability tests
notes: Well-known luggage brand; good fit for mainstream and family travel creators

name: Hostelworld (Creator Program)
collaborationStyle: hostel collabs, budget route planning, social travel content
notes: Explicitly geared creator/affiliate program tier making hostel stays accessible to smaller travel channels

name: TourRadar
collaborationStyle: multi-day tour reviews, itinerary content, comparison videos
notes: Marketplace of group tours; ideal for creators who test different tour operators and packages

name: Big Bus / city pass operators
collaborationStyle: city overview content, first-timer itineraries, sightseeing pass breakdowns
notes: Ideal for city guide and first-time-visitor creators

name: Wise (formerly TransferWise)
collaborationStyle: international money transfer demos, digital nomad finance content, expat life series
notes: Great for nomad, expat, and travel-finance crossover creators

name: XE / currency apps
collaborationStyle: budgeting in foreign currencies, travel money tips, multi-country trip planning
notes: Simple but useful integration for travel budgeting and cost-of-living content

name: Ekster Wallets
collaborationStyle: travel gear review, minimalist packing, everyday carry
notes: Smart wallet brand; ideal for minimalist travel or everyday carry content

name: Nomad Lane
collaborationStyle: carry-on review, digital nomad packing, travel gear showcase
notes: Cult carry-on and travel bag brand for digital nomads; great fit for remote work travel creators

name: Saily
collaborationStyle: international travel tip, eSIM demo, connectivity story
notes: NordVPN-backed eSIM app; aggressively entering the creator sponsorship space with competitive rates

name: Polarsteps
collaborationStyle: trip documentation story, travel journaling, route showcase
notes: Travel tracking and trip book app; ideal for long-term travelers and creators who document full journeys

name: Pack & Smooch
collaborationStyle: travel accessories review, aesthetic gear showcase, minimalist packing
notes: Handmade felt and leather tech accessories for travelers; ideal for aesthetic minimalist or digital nomad creators

name: TravelPerk
collaborationStyle: business travel story, travel management demo, corporate travel integration
notes: Business travel management platform; strong fit for creators covering entrepreneurship, remote work, or business travel

name: Tropicfeel
collaborationStyle: travel sneaker/gear reviews, one-bag packing content, nomad lifestyle
notes: Crowdfunded travel gear brand; excellent for one-bag and nomad creators

name: Hopper
collaborationStyle: flight and hotel deal hunting, app walkthroughs, budget travel series
notes: Booking app with price prediction; fit for budget and hack-oriented travel creators

name: SafetyWing
collaborationStyle: digital nomad insurance content, visa/relocation stories, remote work travel
brandPersonality: remote-first, digital nomad-centric, subscription-like, minimalist branding
notes: Insurance brand specifically for nomads and remote workers; perfect for that subniche

name: Remote Year / group work-travel programs
collaborationStyle: program experience stories, remote work lifestyle series, destination rotations
notes: Group remote work experiences; ideal for creators talking about nomadism and location-independent careers

name: Minaal / minimal carry brands
collaborationStyle: one-bag travel content, minimalist packing guides, long-term travel setups
notes: For hardcore minimal one-bag travel channels

name: TrailWallet / travel budget apps
collaborationStyle: travel budget breakdowns, trip cost-of-living content, long-term budgeting
notes: Software tools helping long-term and full-time travelers manage finances

name: WayAway Plus
collaborationStyle: cashback travel content, deal-hunting episodes, flight search demos
notes: Cashback on flight/hotel bookings; strong for budget-conscious and hack-style travel creators

name: TravelLine packing cubes / organizers
collaborationStyle: packing systems content, carry-on only challenges, family packing guides
notes: Packing cube/organizer brands fit packing tutorial and travel organization channels well

name: Local tourism boards / DMO campaigns
collaborationStyle: sponsored city/region guides, seasonal campaigns, niche destination series
notes: Tourism boards often sponsor even small travel creators for destination campaigns
